## [00:00 - 01:02]

The last file that we're going to build for you are big deals. We're going to hunt unicorns here, not big whales. We're going to hunt the unicorn here, okay? We're going to build a file of all the big deals. The big deals that your company had attention on years ago, had a bunch invested in. They're like, we got to get this client, but they've yet to close them. And probably somebody gave up on that file. So no one's any longer working that file. They gave up, but there was a lot of energy, resources, and investment made on making that work. So sit down with your executive team, your management team. They've been here longer than you. I want you to find out a short list who the company has not been successful with. I want you to start with the major monster deals and go to medium-sized deals. And anything your company has attention on. Time and energy has been invested in these clients. Someone gave up or left because they couldn't finish it. They're still prospects for you. They're prospects for anybody that picks up with a creative like, I'm taking this account over and I'm going to build this into a real account. Make that list now.
